text.content: P1 Instagram Reel — Royal Pop accessories: What's missing?
Royal Pop Straps and Adapters Launching Soon
Royal Pop accessories: What's missing?
Copy

{
  "hook_0_3s": "Royal Pop accessories: What's missing?",
  "body_3_25s": "Competitor straps look great but lack crucial features like quick release and custom fit options. With Royal Pop Wrist Kit, you get a seamless clip-in adapter, premium silicone or leather strap, plus a microfiber pouch and spare pins. Upgrade your watch experience without compromise.",
  "cta_25_30s": "Tell me what you'd pay for a wrist kit like this",
  "b_roll": [
    "shot of competitor strap",
    "close-up of Royal Pop clip-in adapter in action",
    "showing premium straps and pouch"
  ],
  "caption": "Royal Pop accessories: What's missing? Competitor straps look great but lack crucial features. Upgrade your watch experience with our seamless kit. #royalpop #apswatch #watchaccessories #wristkit #watchupgrade\n\nIndependent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.",
  "hashtags": [
    "#royalpop",
    "#apswatch",
    "#watchaccessories",
    "#wristkit",
    "#watchupgrade"
  ]
}
Visual Brief

  "body_3_25s": "We're diving into the details today, bringing our premium Royal Pop Wrist Conversion Kit to life with precision and care. From selecting high-quality materials to crafting a perfect fit, every step matters in creating something truly special for you.",

P5 Email — Your Thoughts on Royal Pop Collection?
Internet Reaction to Royal Pop Collection
Your Thoughts on Royal Pop Collection?
Copy

{
  "subject": "Your Thoughts on Royal Pop Collection?",
  "preview_text": "Let us know what you think and help set pricing.",
  "body": "Dear [Subscriber],

We're excited to introduce the Swatch x AP-inspired Royal Pop collection, a unique blend of luxury and affordability. Your opinion is crucial as we gauge interest and refine our offerings.

What do you think of the Royal Pop collection? Share your thoughts and suggest pricing that aligns with premium quality without breaking the bank.

Thank you for being part of our community!

Best regards,
The Royal Pop Team

Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.",
  "cta_text": "Reply with your thoughts and pricing suggestions",
  "sign_off": "The Royal Pop Team"
}
